scripts.test: npm run test:protocol && npm run test:monero && npm run test:monero:refund && npm run test:social && npm run test:inbox && npm run test:chat && npm run test:profile && npm run test:payments && npm run test:vod && npm run test:mobile:permissions && npm run test:whep && npm run test:playback
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run lint && npm run build
scripts.stack:up: npm run mediamtx:gen && DSTREAM_MEDIAMTX_CONFIG=/tmp/dstream-mediamtx.yml docker compose up -d --build
scripts.stack:up:real-wallet: npm run mediamtx:gen && DSTREAM_MEDIAMTX_CONFIG=/tmp/dstream-mediamtx.yml docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.real-wallet.yml up -d --build
scripts.check:mobile: npm run check:mobile-shell && npm run check:mobile:golden
scripts.mobile:release:ios:testflight: MOBILE_RELEASE_TARGET=ios MOBILE_RELEASE_STRICT=1 node scripts/check-mobile-store-release.mjs && bash scripts/mobile-release.sh ios testflight
scripts.mobile:release:ios:appstore: MOBILE_RELEASE_TARGET=ios MOBILE_RELEASE_STRICT=1 node scripts/check-mobile-store-release.mjs && bash scripts/mobile-release.sh ios appstore
scripts.mobile:release:android:internal: MOBILE_RELEASE_TARGET=android MOBILE_RELEASE_STRICT=1 node scripts/check-mobile-store-release.mjs && bash scripts/mobile-release.sh android internal
scripts.mobile:release:android:production: MOBILE_RELEASE_TARGET=android MOBILE_RELEASE_STRICT=1 node scripts/check-mobile-store-release.mjs && bash scripts/mobile-release.sh android production
scripts.smoke:e2e:firefox: npm run mediamtx:gen && DSTREAM_MEDIAMTX_CONFIG=/tmp/dstream-mediamtx.yml docker compose up -d --no-deps --force-recreate mediamtx && DSTREAM_SMOKE_BROWSER_APP=Firefox bash scripts/smoke-e2e.sh
scripts.smoke:integrity:firefox: npm run mediamtx:gen && DSTREAM_MEDIAMTX_CONFIG=/tmp/dstream-mediamtx.yml docker compose up -d --no-deps --force-recreate mediamtx && DSTREAM_SMOKE_BROWSER_APP=Firefox bash scripts/smoke-integrity.sh
